creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Hans for picking this up.  I was waiting to hear back from anyone here.  I'll pass the PR to you and you can probably close it after MFCs.

For what is worth I think I do understand what triggered the problem for me a lot better these days.  I wrote some notes here https://wiki.freebsd.org/BjoernZeeb/USB  ;  if needed we can take that offline.
